name: cli-anything-adguardhome
tagline: CLI for managing AdGuard Home DNS/ad-blocking (filters, rewrites, clients, DHCP, logs) via its REST API.
verdict: Functional, well-documented CLI wrapper with dual output modes and agent-facing error-handling guidance. Critical issue: the prerequisites instruct piping a downloaded install script straight into `sh` (curl | sh), an unreviewed remote-code-execution pattern regardless of official branding. Also missing negative-trigger scoping and rerun-duplication.

highlights.summary: Prerequisites instruct piping a downloaded install script directly into sh with no review step.
Description explains capabilities but doesn't state situational triggers or example phrasings.
No NOT-for/out-of-scope guidance despite a broad DNS/ad-block admin command surface.
